markdown:
# MVP Completion Audit

Generated: 2026-06-12T06:36:31.481Z
Campaign: cc-rubber-base-demo-2026-06-10
Status: incomplete
MVP complete: no

## Objective

Build a Crystal Clawz Social Studio MVP that wires Postiz, MoneyPrinterTurbo, and brand files into a review-first content workflow.

## Requirements

- Brand brain and MVP brief: complete - Brand context and MVP plan are available.
- Scoped agents, skills, and build-check-edit loop: complete - MVP plan names the plugins, skills, agent lanes, and build-check-edit loop.
- UGC, ad video, and post workflow coverage: complete - UGC video, paid ad video, and normal post assets are planned through review.
- MoneyPrinterTurbo draft media: complete - Draft video and review packet are available.
- Postiz review-first handoff: complete - Postiz handoff remains manual, local, and command-only.
- No live posting enabled: complete - Scheduling and publishing remain disabled.
- Verified tests, build, and scans: complete - Latest readiness audit includes passing verification flags.
- Postiz local input safety: complete - Local Postiz input files are checked for API keys, tokens, and secrets.
- Postiz local input validation: complete - Local Postiz input validation report is present, redacted, and safe.
- Rollback and not-live proof: complete - Rollback and not-live proof is documented for the draft-only handoff.
- Human approval recorded: blocked - Record human approval first.
- Real local Postiz input values: blocked - Real Postiz integration IDs and uploaded media references are still required.
- Postiz draft dry-run package: blocked - Dry-run package has not been created.
- Approved draft-only MVP complete: blocked - The MVP is not complete until every requirement above is complete.

## Next Action

- Record human approval before treating the MVP as complete.
